# Multica

Updated: 2026-06-17
Canonical: https://multica.uk/
Support: support@aigeamy.com

## Summary
Multica is a multi-channel AI automation setup service for teams that need a practical path from channel choice to launch, checkout, deployment tracking, and follow-up. It helps teams plan Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp, and customer-chat automation without turning each channel into a separate setup project.

## Core pages
- Home: https://multica.uk/
- Pricing: https://multica.uk/pricing/
- Checkout fallback: https://multica.uk/checkout/
- Privacy: https://multica.uk/privacy/
- Terms: https://multica.uk/terms/

## Traffic intent pages
- multica telegram: https://multica.uk/multica-telegram/ - Multica Telegram Agent Workspace
- multi ca: https://multica.uk/multi-ca-agent-workspace/ - Multi CA Agent Workspace Guide

## Pricing anchors
- Setup Audit: $9/mo public setup audit anchor
- Automation Setup: $29/mo first multi-channel rollout anchor
- Managed Rollout: $79/mo governed rollout anchor
